intended_use.summary: Detect wheel components (rims, bolts, full wheels) for automotive visual inspection, with a specific focus on more precise bolt (`parafuso`) detection.
out_of_scope: internal hub components such as bearings or brake discs
motorcycle, bicycle or heavy vehicle wheels
damage or deformation detection on parts

data.labeling_notes: Only fully visible objects annotated; bolts not perfectly visible were initially discarded, but re-evaluated with new detailed close-up data to mitigate False Negatives. `roda` boxes encompass the outer limit of the visible tire, `jante` boxes strictly the rim. In composite shots, the rim box is contained within the wheel box.

limitations: Undetected bolts may still occur if low-contrast boundaries blur entirely against dark rims or shadows.
Extreme capture angles far from frontal distort geometry and diminish object size, making bolt detection harder.
Trained on daylight/indoor images; night conditions are untested.

license.notes: No personally identifiable information in dataset. No proprietary logos intentionally captured.
